TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Butch Booker nalecuh i Amilika, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. Butch Booker i 1969 a mihcaan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 4 ku uwac atu silsil 46, namapili' tu nu Seattle SuperSonics putiput. nalecuhan ciniza i 7 a bulad 20 a demiad, 1945 a mihcaan, Butch Booker, miunduay.
S.PHON: but ¶ƒß book…ôr nar~…æ…ô ¶uƒß i amir~…æika, nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~…æi miunduaj nu amir~…æika nba nisakaput, paƒßanƒßanan tu kawaw ajza. but ¶ƒß book…ôr i **** a miƒß ¶aan nba sapapir~…æi î~ ° mimar~…æiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwa ¶ atu sir~…æsir~…æ **, namapir~…æi î~ ° tu nu s…ôattr~…æ…ô sup…ôrsoni ¶s putiput. nar~…æ…ô ¶uƒßan ¶iniza i * a bur~…æad ** a d…ômiad, **** a miƒß ¶aan, but ¶ƒß book…ôr, miunduaj.
S.FORM: Butch Booker nalecuh i Amilika, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. Butch Booker i 1969 a mihcaan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 4 ku uwac atu silsil 46, namapili' tu nu Seattle SuperSonics putiput. nalecuhan ciniza i 7 a bulad 20 a demiad, 1945 a mihcaan, Butch Booker, miunduay.
S.PHON: but ¶ƒß book…ôr nar~…æ…ô ¶uƒß i amir~…æika, nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~…æi miunduaj nu amir~…æika nba nisakaput, paƒßanƒßanan tu kawaw ajza. but ¶ƒß book…ôr i **** a miƒß ¶aan nba sapapir~…æi î~ ° mimar~…æiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwa ¶ atu sir~…æsir~…æ **, namapir~…æi î~ ° tu nu s…ôattr~…æ…ô sup…ôrsoni ¶s putiput. nar~…æ…ô ¶uƒßan ¶iniza i * a bur~…æad ** a d…ômiad, **** a miƒß ¶aan, but ¶ƒß book…ôr, miunduaj.
